-- 1 of 4 --

Key Questions
• 	What would it mean for your life and business if you did a great launch?
How much money would that be for you?
• 	What would it mean in terms of your list building? i.e. number of people
you add to your list
• 	What would it mean in terms of your market positioning?
• 	What would it mean for your lifestyle? i.e. go full-time, go on vacation,
etc.
• 	What’s your launch sales goal? This is usually very different for most
people
• 	My story
• 	I thought if I could make $10,000 in a launch that’d be great, and
$100,000 would be a dream come true
• 	I Initially applied for a merchant account and was approved for
$4,000/month - I remember thinking “what do I need all this for?”
• 	I did $1,650 on first launch, and within three years did a $100,000
launch
The results from these launches can be shocking…
The Business Launch Formula comes down to having a list and periodically
doing launches. During a launch you build your relationship with your list.
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 4 --

People think that sending launch emails annoys the list - this is wrong.
Often you’ll also build your list through word of mouth - without any JV’s or
affiliates.
You’ll receive a lot of great ideas for new products during and after your
launch. The cycle continues as you again build your relationship with your
list and offer new products.
!
Example: John Gallagher
• 	John had a small newsletter list - 1,800 people
• 	He created a board game about edible medicinal plants and herbs and
sold 12 of them
• 	He then bought Product Launch Formula and did a proper launch to the
same list - he sold 670 of them
• 	He created another product, an Herbal Kit - this is a physical product he
was selling for $50
• 	He launched the kit to his warm list and was very successful. Over the
years he has now sold $250,000 worth of kits
• 	This led to creating a membership site - he did a launch for this too
• 	Members pay $10 a month - got 350 members to sign up - so this is
$3,500 per month in recurring income
!
3	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 3 of 4 --

• 	The cycle continued and he did a relaunch and earned another 500
members - now has 3,000 members in this site
• 	John continues to do a product launch around once a month
• 	He’s now added video courses and does several launches a year
• 	They sell for between $100-200, and a typical launch does $200,000-
$330,000
• 	As you can see, this is now a serious 7-figure business - and he started
from food stamps
!
Conclusion
It’s not necessary to have this all planned out ahead of time
The key is to listen to the audience, build the list, build the relationship,
and let the market define what you should do next
Strategically use your launches to build your list, relationships, product
portfolio, and positioning in the market
!
!
!
!
!
